creator: olli@secnetix.de
text:
Appendix C.1 contains a list of all public FreeBSD
mailing lists.  In this list, "freebsd-multimedia"
is missing, even though it is very much alive.

How-To-Repeat: 
Look at Appendix C.1 of the Handbook and try to find
the freebsd-multimedia list.  :-)
http://www.freebsd.org/handbook/eresources.html
